title: MoodTunes - AI Powered Music Player
description: Real-time emotion detection app using MediaPipe Face Landmarker that classifies 4 moods (Happy, Sad, Surprise, Neutral) via weighted blendshape scoring and auto-plays mood-matched songs from a MongoDB library. Includes JWT authentication, REST APIs, and custom audio player with queue management.

title: Postra - Full Stack Social Media Platform
description: Instagram-inspired full-stack social media platform with JWT authentication using HTTP-only cookies. Includes profile photo uploads via Multer and ImageKit, dynamic feed, real-time like/unlike, follow/unfollow, and production deployment on Render with MongoDB Atlas.

title: Productivity Dashboard
description: A full-featured productivity dashboard for task management, workflow organization, Pomodoro timer, weather updates, and daily planning with persistent local storage.

title: Weather App
description: A responsive weather application that fetches and displays real-time weather data for any city using a public API with a clean and simple UI.

title: React Image Gallery
description: A modern image gallery built with React and Tailwind CSS featuring filtering effects such as grayscale and blur, along with a responsive grid layout.

title: Virtual Piano
description: An interactive virtual piano built using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript that allows users to play musical notes using keyboard input.
